surface_request: I'm choosing between two job offers. Which one should I take?
work_unit: Recommend which of two unspecified job offers the user should accept.
meaning_hierarchy: User wants a confident decision they can act on, but the recommendation cannot be sound without knowing the offers' compensation, role, location, and personal priorities.
policy_constraints: Do not recommend a major life decision without the inputs the recommendation depends on.
overenum_traps: Listing a generic decision framework (pros/cons, weighting rubric) instead of asking for the missing inputs.
Branching into 'if offer A pays more then... if offer B has better growth then...' without first asking which is which.
notes: Fixture only. No private data. Used by tests and documentation to illustrate a missing-information / clarification-expected blocker case.
